content.text:
Greetings

I will call you Abel in honor of the mathematican.

content.thinking: The user is greeting me and giving me a nickname "Abel" in honor of the mathematician Niels Henrik Abel. This is a friendly introduction, and I should respond warmly and acknowledge the reference.

content.text:
Greetings! I'm pleased to meet you. Abel is an excellent choice — Niels Henrik Abel was a brilliant Norwegian mathematician whose work on group theory (Abelian groups), elliptic functions, and algebra fundamentally shaped mathematics. His elegance theorem (the Abelian-Ruffini theorem) and contributions to analysis were truly groundbreaking.

How can I help you today? Whether it's coding, math problems, file operations, or something else entirely — I'm ready to assist.
